description: CompositionBlack sleeveles top with a cross-over panel round neck, bead and sequence embellishments on the right chest and flanneled from the waistFittingRegularWash careMachine or hand wash separatelyUse mild detergent onlyDo not bleach or wringUse mild detergent onlyDry in shadeMedium ironThere's no way you'll go unnoticed in this strikingly stylish black top from jealous 21. With a cross-over neck and embellishments only on the right chest, it accentuates your sense of style to the hilt. The flannel along the waist enhances the feminity of this top, while you stay fresh all day long in this cotton top. Team this with skinny jeans and high-heeled sandals from the wide range at myntra for that stylish touch. Model's statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.7", Chest-33", Waist-25"
